description: An IT auditor reviews user access to a critical SaaS application like Salesforce or Workday.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a user listing with their assigned permission levels directly from the SaaS application.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has a complete list of users and their roles.

nodes.task_description: Perform a periodic access review by sending a list of users to the business data owner to certify that their access is still required.

expected_outcome.value: The business owner reviews the list and identifies 5 users who have changed roles and no longer need access.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the access for the 5 identified users was removed promptly after certification.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms that the unnecessary access was revoked.
